doses.name: Apex
doses.description: Built for the athlete and the gym warrior, Apex climbs through three frequency tiers to sharpen you for the work ahead. At 3 Hz, reaction time gets razor-quick. At 3.5 Hz, receptivity opens up. At 6.3 Hz, learning shifts into overdrive — a clean, non-chemical lift for training and competition. No needles, no asterisks, just you, tuned up.

doses.name: Clear Skies (Hangover Cure)
doses.description: A soothing morning-recovery session built from gentle low-frequency tones that ease a throbbing head and settle a queasy stomach. Soft, warming harmonics roll in like sunrise, washing the fog out of your skull and leaving behind a clear, rehydrated, finally-human-again kind of calm.

doses.name: Critical Mass
doses.description: It starts low and patient — a slow tide of feeling that climbs, and climbs, until it crests into something almost too bright to hold. Then? Critical mass. BOOM. The blast flings you clean past the edge of the known, out into the deep black where reality runs out of road and there's nothing left to grip but the frequency itself.

doses.name: Eclipse
doses.description: The anti-stimulant. It takes your brain and gives it a quarter-turn until everything shines with this impossible glow — then it pulls all that light back down, inward, deep into the dark where you actually live. Eclipse drops you into a quiet room with your own soul and lets the two of you hash it out. No words. No noise. Just you, meeting you. Not for casual users.

doses.name: Enough
doses.description: A focused session for taming appetite — it hushes the cravings, steadies the will, and settles your mind into a calm, satisfied kind of control. Lean back, let the gentle pulse roll through, and feel the urge to reach for more just… loosen its grip and dissolve.

doses.name: Hard Reset
doses.description: A jolting, high-voltage session built from stuttering pulses and sudden surges — designed to scramble the signal and then reboot it clean. A disorienting, electric ride that's strictly for the adventurous. Listeners with steady nerves only.

doses.name: Precipice
doses.description: Stand at the lip of a cliff with your eyes shut. Vertigo wraps around you, the world starts to spin, and the air goes thin and crisp — carrying that hazy, drunken altitude-high you'd normally have to climb a mountain to earn. You feel the drop yawning out in front of you without ever once opening your eyes to see it. Lie down for this one. Advanced users only.

doses.name: Quicksilver
doses.description: A stimulant rush laced with euphoria and crystalline mental clarity, cracking open into a feeling of pure openness and intellectual expansion. First-timers catch a mild psychedelic shimmer at the edges — but lean on it a few times and those mind-bending fringes burn off, leaving raw physical and mental stimulation in their place. A hybrid designer dose. Experienced users only.

doses.name: Shockwave
doses.description: A tidal surge of well-being and exhilaration rolls in — and riding shotgun is a massive spike of alertness and energy that scrubs every trace of fatigue clean off the map. The rush takes you somewhere bright and high and just… won't quit. No dips, no mercy, no coming down — not until the whole ride decides it's done with you.

doses.name: Terra Incognita
doses.description: An unmarked door. No label, no promises, no spoilers. Press play with absolutely no idea what's waiting on the other side, and let an unpredictable wave of frequencies sweep you somewhere you never could've called in advance. No map, no handrail. Strictly for the curious and the brave.

doses.name: Unhooked
doses.description: Somewhere between 4 Hz and 6 Hz, the brain slips into a state primed for shifts in attitude and behavior. This dose targets 8 Hz to stir the synapses and support breaking the habit's hold — reach for it mid-craving or run it preventatively. Most powerful when it's riding shotgun with your own willpower, not doing the driving for you.

doses.name: Velvet Thorn
doses.description: For those who like their pleasure braided tight with a little pain. It opens in a warm wash of opiate numbness and rolling pleasure-waves, swells up into an intense, near-orgasmic ecstasy — then twists, threading sharp little pings of pain right through the euphoria. Beautiful and brutal in equal measure. Not for the faint of heart, and not meant for everyone.

doses.name: Cloudbreak
doses.description: Cloudbreak lifts the dull gray haze of a flat, foggy day. Bright, clearing tones sweep the clouds straight out of your mind and leave a fresh, colorful lightness where the murk used to sit. The overcast parts. The color comes back.

doses.name: Confidence
doses.description: For the moments that ask the most of you — the big date, the room full of strangers, the test, the mic, the crowd staring back. Shyness can grab any of us by the collar, and this dose has a real track record for pushing back that rising tide of self-consciousness so you can just… show up as you. Steady. Loose. Yours.

doses.name: Crescendo
doses.description: A lavish, layered journey of binaural tones that stack wave upon wave into a swelling, full-body rush of bliss. Each pass carries you higher — into warm, radiant euphoria that glows right through you — before easing off and letting you drift gently back down to earth. A slow build worth the climb.

doses.name: First Light
doses.description: A warm, dark-roasted lift — like that first sacred cup before the world's fully awake. A gentle wave of alertness, clarity, and cozy focus rolls in to burn the fog off, smooth and comforting the whole way. Real energy, zero jitters. Just you, the quiet, and the climb into the day.

doses.name: Neon Heart
doses.description: Party till the sun catches you. The lights, the waves of bliss breaking over every inch of you, the euphoria streaming hot through your veins, the music pumping, the dancing that just won't stop. A warm-hearted, wide-open, emotionally-connected state with the senses cranked all the way up. Experienced listeners only.

doses.name: Reverie
doses.description: Tuned to the Theta 3–7 Hz range — the band tied to recall, fantasy, imagery, creativity, and raw inspiration — Reverie throws the floodgates wide for writers, artists, and dreamers. Ideas come loose and start to flow, writer's block dissolves, and the imagination roams without a fence in sight across a full thirty-minute session.

doses.name: Synthesis
doses.description: Synthesis is our hybrid recreational smart-dose, built to nudge you up to the next tier. Instead of dulling the senses, it stirs the brainwaves tied to both analytical and imaginative thought — leaving you parked in a place of deep contemplation and crisp, glass-clear clarity as the session quietly unfolds around you.

doses.name: Venus
doses.description: Venus eases you up from a faint shimmer of euphoria into the body itself — tingling, warmth, a slow spreading heat — then melts the anxiety clean away and settles you into that Venus state: love, sexuality, sensuality, harmony. Layer by layer it carries mind and body toward a place of warm, willing readiness. Unhurried. Inviting.

doses.name: Victory
doses.description: Victory sets your mind into the state of already having won. Before the game, the workout, the speech — any moment that demands a winning edge — it hands you a serious mental head start, so triumph feels like a foregone conclusion before you've taken a single step. You walk in already holding the trophy.

doses.name: Consonance
doses.description: Consonance is a soul-dose with no tiredness, no sleep, no drowsiness anywhere in it. Instead it eases the soul, tunes you into harmony with the earth, with space, with everything that is — melting you gently into the warmth of an invisible glow that simply has to be felt to be understood. Not a state you think your way into. One you fall into tune with.

doses.name: Featherfall
doses.description: A soft, weightless drift toward sleep — as if you're cradled and watched over by something gentle and unhurried. Warm, slow tones loosen every muscle one by one and lower you down, down, into a peaceful, untroubled rest. No effort. Just the falling.

doses.name: Gravity
doses.description: For when you need to calm doooown. Gravity brings you from high to low in twenty minutes flat, melting stress and anxiety into a relaxed, settled calm — easing you all the way down to ground without ever tipping you over into sleep. A soft landing, wheels-down, fully awake.

doses.name: Lightward
doses.description: Slip the headphones on and let the binaural tones walk your mind down out of busy alpha into deep, low frequencies. As the waves wash lower, the bouts of sadness seem to loosen and dissolve — easing you back toward a quiet, reachable kind of happiness. Down into the low, up into the light.

doses.name: Right as Rain
doses.description: Right as Rain calms and uplifts in the same breath, sweeping the negative thoughts out until everything just… settles into place. Soothing but quietly energizing, it leaves you smiling and worry-free — a genuine bit of relief for life's more knotted, stressful stretches. Nothing's wrong. Everything fits.

doses.name: Solace
doses.description: Solace offers a brief respite from life's demands — a pocket of peace where your troubles quietly loosen and fade. It hushes the mental chatter and unknots the tension, tuning your brain toward tranquility and composure, and holds open a little space for reflection whenever solitude lets you slip away. A breath you actually get to finish.

doses.name: Unclench
doses.description: Unclench works on two levels at once. When anxiety has you in its grip, it eases the rising tide and helps you ride up over it — and taken beforehand, it steadies your nerves for the speech, the crowd, the party, so you walk in already loose and at ease. Reactive when you need it, preventative when you're smart.

doses.name: Afterglow
doses.description: The feeling of afterglow — when the heat of lust has burned down and what's left is this contented warmth you get to just lie in. A quiet inner shimmer trailing the fireworks. Lean back, settle into your breathing, and savor the sensations as they drift and change and move slow through you. The fire's out. The warmth stays.

doses.name: Cascade
doses.description: An intensifying journey of sensation that rolls in wave after wave after wave. Your body gets swept up in the beautiful chaos of it — doing the thing that feels good, again, and again, and again — as the glow climbs higher and burns brighter with every single crest. No plateau. Just the next wave, bigger than the last.

doses.name: Mirage
doses.description: This session weaves simulated fantasy together with dream recall, threaded with segments built to hand you lucid levels of control. It guides you down into elaborate, vivid, sensual dreamscapes — while keeping the picture sharp enough to carry back with you when you wake. Dream it, steer it, keep it.

doses.name: Smitten
doses.description: This session recreates the full emotional and physical glow of falling in love. As you listen, expect the heart to swoop, a gentle warmth to spread, a flicker of arousal, and a wash of well-being — everything around you looking suddenly brighter and more beautiful, the way it does when you're falling. The chemistry of a crush, bottled.

doses.name: Sustain
doses.description: A short, focused session meant as a quick listen before intimate moments. The gentle tones settle the body and stretch out a sense of steady, lasting calm and endurance — so the ease carries all the way through, start to finish. One note, held long.

doses.name: Zenith
doses.description: Sometimes you just want to make it happen — hard, good, no waiting. Zenith is built to carry you up to the mind-state right on the edge of orgasm and hold you at the summit: our strongest, fastest, most sensual dose. All the tension, all the heat, balanced at the very top of the arc.

doses.name: 5HTP
doses.description: 5HTP is the precursor your brain uses to make serotonin, your HAPPY hormone. This gentle session aims to balance your serotonin and melatonin, lifting mood and easing you toward calmer, deeper sleep.

doses.name: Absinthe
doses.description: Lucidity hits slowly as your speech becomes very articulate and your ideas clear. A surreal state where you feel drunk but you aren't, the green muse of clarity and dreamlike perception that once inspired Van Gogh and Baudelaire.

doses.name: Acid
doses.description: An initial burst followed by a stream-of-conscious mellowing that fades into bliss. Expect a notably intense onset, shifting perceptions, emotional waves, and a long drift through altered awareness.

doses.name: Adrenaline
doses.description: Tap into the fight-or-flight surge. This session is designed to deliver a burst of highly powerful, self-confident energy, sharpening you for moments that demand intense physical or mental exertion.

doses.name: Adrenochrome
doses.description: An oxidation product of adrenaline that earned its notoriety through cult literary references. Known for a reputation of disorientation and hallucination, this session carries you into strange, unsteady territory.

doses.name: Alcohol
doses.description: Like sinking into a few glasses of spirits: relaxation, mood lift, happiness, giddiness, talkativeness, lowered inhibitions and eased social anxiety. The effects arrive intensely then diminish into flighty, overexcited warmth, with none of the hangover.

doses.name: AntiMigraine
doses.description: Designed for headache relief, this session carries you from a normal alpha state down to a migraine-busting .5hz level. Soothing relief for those battling migraines, cluster headaches, or everyday tension.

doses.name: BufoToad
doses.description: Inspired by the psychoactive venom of certain toad species, this is one of our strongest doses. A potent, otherworldly journey best left to experienced listeners; beginners should start elsewhere.

doses.name: Cocaine
doses.description: Increases alertness and wakefulness, elevates the mood, brings a mild to high degree of euphoria, sharpens thinking and concentration, and floods you with energy while melting away fatigue. A surging stimulant rush that comes close to the extreme.

doses.name: Crack
doses.description: A purified, faster-hitting cousin of cocaine, producing effects within minutes that are intensely euphoric and last 20 to 30 minutes. An overwhelming high gives way to euphoria with possible delusions, then a harsh comedown. Not for inexperienced listeners.

doses.name: Crack_unofficial
doses.description: An unofficial, harder-edged variant built for an explosive rush: a near-instant surge of euphoric energy that peaks fast and crashes hard. A raw, jagged ride for thrill-seeking listeners only.

doses.name: Crystal Meth
doses.description: A relentless stimulant session bringing increased energy and alertness, a vanishing need for sleep, euphoria, heightened sexuality, and racing talkativeness. It blends a stimulant edge with MDMA-like openness and intellectual expansion, but its sweaty, voice-hearing intensity earns its Very Strong rating; use with caution.

doses.name: Demerol
doses.description: A synthetic opioid-style session that slows your brain activity and brings on strong sedation and euphoria. The smooth onset is felt 10 to 15 minutes in, settling you into a heavy, painless calm.

doses.name: Dexies
doses.description: A raw amphetamine-style ride with nothing smooth about it: racing thoughts, jitters, a pounding heart, and chaotic, uncontrolled dissociation. This could be a rough one, recommended for advanced listeners only.

doses.name: Divinorum
doses.description: Divine: to see in new light the world around you, shimmering. A deep, inward spiritual journey designed to help you see within yourself.

doses.name: DMT
doses.description: The feeling of this dose is as though one had been struck by noetic lightning. The ordinary world is almost instantaneously replaced, not only with a hallucination, but a hallucination whose alien character is its utter alienness. Nothing in this world can prepare one for the impressions that fill your mind when you enter the sensorium. The paradox is that it is the most powerful yet most harmless of all these things. Load Universe into Cannon. Aim at Brain. Fire.

doses.name: DXM
doses.description: Mood lift, euphoria, giggling and laughing, the dissociation of mind from body, and creative dreamlike experiences. Many feel warm, empathic sentiments toward others, and some swear this audio journey surpasses the substance itself.

doses.name: HASH
doses.description: Stronger than marijuana, hash brings on mood lift, euphoria, laughter, relaxation, stress reduction, and creative, philosophical, deep thinking, all with much greater effects than marijuana.

doses.name: Heroin
doses.description: A surge of euphoria accompanied by warm skin flushing, dry mouth, and heavy extremities. The experience transitions into "the nod"-an alternating state between wakefulness and drowsiness where you will dream while awake, and be awake while you dream. Characterized as roughly ten times more intense than the Opium dose, recommended only for experienced users willing to test their limits.

doses.name: Kava
doses.description: A tranquil island reverie modeled after the cool, earthy kava root beverage. Listeners drift into numbing relaxation of both mind and muscle, settling into a unique euphoric calm that is unlike being high or drunk.

doses.name: Ketamine
doses.description: Effects range from mild inebriation, dreamy thinking, and clumsy, robotic movement to extreme difficulty moving, complete dissociation, and entering other realities with classic near-death-experience visions. Expect delayed sensations, vertigo, heightened sociability, and a profoundly altered perception of the world.

doses.name: LSD
doses.description: An increase in energy and stimulation, surging associative and creative thinking, mood lift, and heightened awareness and appreciation. The journey opens into closed- and open-eye visuals and a profound, life-changing spiritual experience-the best known and most researched psychedelic.

doses.name: Marijuana
doses.description: All the effects of that sticky-icky leaf, without the smoke. The session emulates a mellow elevation of mood, philosophical drifting thoughts, heightened appreciation of music, and pleasant waves of physical sensation rolling into that characteristic high.

doses.name: Morning Glory
doses.description: Emotions may shift rapidly through a range from fear to euphoria, while gentle hallucinations distort and transform shapes and movements. Time may seem to slow and the body to bend, with many reporting an enjoyable, mentally stimulating experience of heightened understanding.

doses.name: Morphine
doses.description: A sensation of sinking into slowness with a coherent, calming pull. Relaxation builds until it nearly overwhelms, then breaks into a wash of relief and emotional detachment from daily concerns. As one tester put it: everything is just good, everything is just good.

doses.name: Nitrous
doses.description: A quick-high of rapid onset and offset bringing giggling, euphoria, and exhilaration. Sound distorts, external stimuli fade, and a clumsy loss of dexterity and balance sweeps in almost instantly before lifting just as fast-a brief, intense burst.

doses.name: Opium
doses.description: Opium can bring euphoria followed by a sense of well-being and a calm, drowsy sedation. Breathing slows, time reverses or stops, and the world softens into a gentle haze.

doses.name: Oxy
doses.description: The perfect simulation of a high-level dose, hitting with full force and none of the slow time-release. One of the most intense prescription-style experiences offered, designed for advanced users only.

doses.name: Peyote
doses.description: A mystical loss of oneself, a disorientation of the senses, with distortions in body image and perception. The session opens a true altered state of consciousness alongside an inability to communicate and a heightened suggestibility-not a toy, and not for the weak minded.

doses.name: Prozium
doses.description: The ups and downs of life can hurt. This dose aims to even out mood fluctuations, promoting emotional equilibrium and resilience-meant to be applied whenever feeling angry, sad, or off-balance to settle into calm stability.

doses.name: Ritalin
doses.description: Increases in alertness and focus while blocking hunger and fatigue. Listeners may feel waves of warmth followed by strong, hyper-attentive alertness and awareness, with sustained effects carrying throughout the day.

doses.name: Speed
doses.description: A stimulant rush of heightened wakefulness bringing increased energy and alertness, a decreased need for sleep, euphoria, increased sexuality, and visual and auditory hallucinations. More extreme than other wake-you-up doses-recommended only for advanced users.

doses.name: Trip
doses.description: A hallucinogenic journey of open-eye visual effects-lights gaining auras, star-patterns, and rainbowing around every glow. Time distorts and emotions sharpen into connection and wonder, with one of the most interesting effects being the feeling of awakening for the first time from a previous state of sleep. Not recommended for everyone.

doses.name: Viagra
doses.description: The perfect compliment to sexual activity. Orgasms begin at normal intensity but the session allows for new, strong arousal minutes later, with subsequent peaks delayed and more intense.

doses.name: Vico
doses.description: Modeled after a strong dose of Vicodin, this session brings improvement of mood, reduction of discomfort, and extreme euphoria rolling in waves. It progresses toward light-headedness and a soft sedation, dissolving into a gentle haze as it concludes.

doses.name: YaBa
doses.description: A potent fusion of hallucinogenic and stimulant effects. Expect an extreme sense of alertness laced with sound distortion, vivid colors, and intense visual effects-keeping you aware and awake inside a powerful, vivid experience that warrants cautious use.

doses.name: Chakra
doses.description: A balancing session that walks your attention up through the seven traditional energy centers, root to crown. The frequencies shift gradually to invite alignment, openness, and calm focus — a gentle, grounding experience that slots neatly into meditation or a wind-down. Bottom to top, one center at a time.

doses.name: Numinous
doses.description:
The one we kept in the vault. A lifetime's work, held back from the world on purpose — not out of secrecy, but because some doors shouldn't swing open for just anyone. Numinous is simply too much. Those who've gone through report fluttering eyelids, a clairvoyance that feels less like imagination and more like seeing, rings of light blooming behind closed eyes, and insight that arrives with the weight of revelation.

But the same door that opens onto the light opens onto everything else. Expect the floor of the self to drop out. Expect fear with no object, the senses scrambling and folding, tears that come from nowhere — weeping, dread, fury, all at once. Insight this raw doesn't ask permission, and it doesn't always leave you the way it found you.
Go in prepared, go in sober, and go in knowing some things can't be unseen.

doses.name: Oneironaut
doses.description: Oneironaut is for the act of waking up inside your dreams — present, aware, and at the controls. The dose sharpens dream recall and unlocks lucidity by carrying you from high theta down into low, where the dreamscape thickens and sharpens around you. It can hand you the steering wheel faster than years of traditional practice usually take — though fair warning: a first lucid breakthrough can hit hard. The dream becomes yours to walk.

doses.name: Untethered
doses.description: A guided descent into the threshold state — the place where the sense of self quietly slips its moorings from the body. The dose eases you down into deep theta, the doorway many tie to astral projection: that feeling of consciousness floating free of physical limits. Best experienced lying down in a quiet, dark space, fully relaxed and undisturbed. The body stays. You don't have to.

doses.name: Vantage
doses.description: Vantage is the experience of perceiving the world from a point outside the physical body — consciousness slipping its anchor and ranging free. Associated phenomena include remote viewing and the sense of taking in distant places you were never standing in. Around 75% of these experiences happen while deeply relaxed, lying down or seated. Your body holds still. Your point of view goes wandering.

doses.name: Alpha
doses.description: 8 to 13 Hz. This is produced when you are awake and fully conscious, but with your awareness focused inside — such as when trying to remember something, or when your eyes are closed. Alpha supports creative problem-solving, accelerated learning, mood elevation, and stress reduction: relaxed, yet alert. An ideal entry point for beginner meditation.

doses.name: Beta
doses.description: Normally generated when you are awake, with the attention focused outside, dealing with the outside world. It is also generated when solving logical problems, such as mental arithmetic. Alert focusing, vitality, concentration on tasks; Earth resonance. Beta causes an increase in mental ability, focus, alertness, and IQ.

doses.name: Condition
doses.description: Take Condition before any other dose in the library and it will prepare your brain to accept that dose more openly. A gentle priming that leaves your mind more receptive and the experience that follows that much richer.

doses.name: Delta
doses.description: 0.5 Hz to 4 Hz. Normally generated in deep sleep, or when unconscious. Those experienced in deep trance states can generate these waves while remaining conscious. Delta is conducive to healing, divine knowledge, personal growth, and meditative states — reaching peak monk-type levels through high-level meditation.

doses.name: Epsilon
doses.description: A descent into the rarest, slowest brainwave territory, where the body falls utterly still and the mind drifts beneath even the deepest sleep. A profound, near-suspended hush settles over you, drawing you toward the quiet edge of conscious awareness.

doses.name: Gamma
doses.description: 25 to 35 Hz. Gamma is associated with information-rich, high-level task processing. It may function as a binding mechanism, connecting cortical structures involved in advanced processing with the thalamus and synchronizing the neurons that process sensory input — sometimes called the brain's operating-system frequency.

doses.name: Reset
doses.description: Reset will return your brain to a normal 8hz level, calm and awake. Use it to clear the lingering effects of a previous dose so you can move cleanly from one experience to the next.

doses.name: Theta
doses.description: 4 to 8 Hz. The region between sleep and wakefulness, in which dreaming and other dream-like or hypnagogic experiences occur — the transitional state just before sleep at night or upon waking. Associated with unconscious-conscious communication, creative insight, deep relaxation, advanced meditation, and vivid mental imagery.

doses.name: You-Choose
doses.description: An hour-long journey that hands the controls to you. It travels through Alpha, Beta, Delta, Gamma, and Theta frequencies, and you decide when you have arrived, stopping the moment the state you came for takes hold rather than riding it out to the end. Advanced users only.
